creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
Created attachment 240811
525.89.02 (merged Jan Beich fixes)

(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #4)
 
Thank you very much, Jan, for checking and the patch. I need new glasses, completely missed it. :)

(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #5)

Thank you for testing. I merged Jan's fixes into the new version of the patch. If it is not a problem, could you please check, if it works for you?

(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #7)

I agree with waiting with approve the patch. I want to spend a bit more time on testing this version of the driver, plus I will be happy if someone else confirms that the problem mentioned in comment #0 does not exist.
